title: Video | Heavy Rain Triggers Flash Floods In Jammu And Kashmir's Doda - NDTV
article_text: Heavy rainfall triggered flash floods in Jammu and Kashmir's Doda district, inundating roads and causing streams to overflow into residential areas. Several homes and vehicles were damaged as boulders and debris were swept through the affected localities. The incident highlights the growing impact of the monsoon across different parts of the country, with authorities monitoring the situation and assessing the damage

title: Valsad Rain: ભારે વરસાદ અને 'રેડ એલર્ટ' ને પગલે તમામ શાળા-કોલેજોમાં શૈક્ષણિક રજા જાહેર - Sandesh
article_text:
A cobra snake got into the moving car of a woman going to office in Ghaziabad this is how her life was saved

At the beginning of the monsoon, a cobra snake appeared on the dashboard of a moving car in Ghaziabad, creating a stir. Find out why snakes are attracted to cars.

title: Video | Maharashtra में Rainfall का तांडव! Pune में भीषण भूस्खलन; Nashik में बादल फटने का खतरा, High Alert! - NDTV Khabar
article_text: Weather Update Today: महाराष्ट्र में मानसून की मूसलाधार बारिश ने भारी तबाही मचाई है. राज्य के कई हिस्सों में हालात बेहद नाजुक बने हुए हैं, जिसे देखते हुए भारतीय नौसेना की वेस्टर्न नेवल कमांड (Western Naval Command) को हाई अलर्ट पर रखा गया है ताकि किसी भी आपात स्थिति में नागरिक प्रशासन की तुरंत मदद की जा सके. इसके साथ ही एनडीआरएफ (NDRF) और एसडीआरएफ (SDRF) की टीमें भी जमीन पर पूरी मुस्तैदी से रेस्क्यू ऑपरेशन में जुटी हुई हैं.
